definition.config: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="config_start" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><next><block type="config_category"><field name="name">MaxEnergy</field><statement name="write"><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">max_stone_energy</field><field name="comment">Max Machine's Energy</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">max_stone_energy</field><field name="value">20000</field></block></value><next><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">max_pipeline_energy</field><field name="comment">Max Pipeline's Energy</field><value name="value"><block type="config_number_variable"><field name="name">max_pipeline_energy</field><field name="value">1000</field></block></value></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></xml>
